title: Beef and Delicate Irish Fritter Stir Fry
description: A traditional Chinese-inspired stir fry recipe featuring tender beef and delicate Irish fritters. Serve immediately over steamed rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the wok and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the wok. Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Irish fritters to the wok and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly browned.
Return the beef to the wok and stir in the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the beef is coated in the sauce.
Serve immediately over steamed rice, garnished with chopped scallions.
